resolved_conflicts.description: Timestamp format for email headers vs calendar events
resolved_conflicts.final_constraint: All internal storage uses ISO 8601 UTC; email headers use RFC 5322 format for transmission only

resolved_conflicts.description: DST transition handling for recurring calendar events
resolved_conflicts.final_constraint: Use IANA database rules with explicit DST gap/overlap handling per RFC 5546

email_processing.inbound_parsing: Accept RFC 5322 date-time with zone or obs-zone; normalize to UTC immediately
email_processing.display_logic: Convert to recipient's configured timezone using current IANA rules (Source C)
email_processing.ambiguity_resolution: Prefer explicit timezone over inferred; reject ambiguous local times during DST transitions

calendar_events.event_storage: UTC with original timezone reference preserved
calendar_events.recurrence_rules: Expand using IANA tzdb (Source C) with VTIMEZONE component
calendar_events.crossing_dst: Use 'latest-occurrence-wins' for overlaps, skip gaps or flag for manual resolution
calendar_events.invitation_emails: Embed calendar data in iCalendar format (UTF-8) with explicit TZID references

api_interfaces.request_format: ISO 8601 with mandatory timezone offset or Z suffix
api_interfaces.response_format: ISO 8601 UTC with original_timezone metadata field
api_interfaces.error_handling: Reject ambiguous local times; require explicit offset for events within 48 hours

superseded_constraints.reason: Superseded by Source A priority in Episode 3
superseded_constraints.description: Store all timestamps in server local time

validation_rules.timezone_identifier: Must be valid IANA tzdb name (e.g., 'America/New_York', not 'EST')
validation_rules.offset_precision: Minute-level precision required; reject second-level offsets
validation_rules.dst_awareness: System must track tzdb version and re-evaluate recurring events when tzdb updates
